nodes.label: Stone Wall Segmenter
nodes.description: Dedicated tool for segmenting individual stones in a wall. Combines contrast enhancement, seed detection, and watershed.

nodes.label: Geo Mask
nodes.description: Apply a binary mask to a GeoTIFF. Pixels outside the mask are set to zero (nodata). Equivalent to Bitwise AND.

nodes.label: Water Mask Refine
nodes.description: Refines a water binary mask: morphological closing to fill gaps, opening to remove noise, area filter to keep only significant water bodies.

nodes.label: Band Info
nodes.description: Display GeoTIFF metadata: bands, dimensions, CRS. Pass-through on geotiff port.

nodes.label: Band Calculator
nodes.description: Free expression on bands. Variables: B1, B2, … Bn. Example: (B4-B3)/(B4+B3+1e-10)

nodes.label: Geo Statistics
nodes.description: Calculate area and value statistics from a GeoTIFF and a binary mask. Outputs area in pixels and hectares.

nodes.label: GeoTIFF Writer
nodes.description: Save a GeoTIFF stream to disk with geographic metadata (CRS, transform).

nodes.label: Band Statistics
nodes.description: Per-band statistics (min, max, mean, std, median). Accepts matrix data or geotiff.

nodes.label: Spectral Index
nodes.description:
Indices: 
• NDVI (Veg): (NIR−Red)/(NIR+Red)
• NDWI (Water): (Green−NIR)/(Green+NIR)
• NBR (Burn): (NIR−SWIR)/(NIR+SWIR)
• EVI (Enh. Veg): 2.5*(NIR−Red)/(NIR+6*Red−7.5*Blue+1)

nodes.label: NDWI Water Index
nodes.description: Normalized Difference Water Index. Standard formula: (Green−NIR)/(Green+NIR) — connect a NIR band to the second input (Sentinel-2 B8, Landsat B5). RGB Approx. mode uses (B−G)/(B+G) for standard RGB images only. Water threshold: >0.2.

nodes.label: Geo Land Cover
nodes.description: Fetch ESA WorldCover 10m classification for the input region. Returns a binary mask for the selected class.

nodes.label: Spectral Index
nodes.description: Generic normalized difference index (A−B)/(A+B). Presets: NDWI, NDVI, NDSI. Custom: pick channels freely. Connect image_b for two-image mode (e.g. separate NIR band).

nodes.label: Band Selector
nodes.description: Select 3 bands from a GeoTIFF and produce an RGB image for standard CV pipelines.

nodes.label: Sediment Layers
nodes.description: Loads a (x,y,z) CSV of sediment conductivity into a regular grid.

nodes.label: Geophysics Index
nodes.description: Compute an index between two layers: normalized diff, ratio, sum, etc.

nodes.label: Grain Segmentation
nodes.description: Segments mineral grains from thin section images using PPL+XPL gradient fusion and watershed.

nodes.label: Opaque Mineral Detect
nodes.description: Detects opaque minerals (magnetite, ilmenite, pyrite…) in thin section images. Dark large blobs in XPL (and PPL when available) are isolated from thin grain-boundary lines using morphological opening and area filtering.

nodes.label: Grain Markers
nodes.description: Builds watershed markers for grain segmentation. Takes a grain-interior mask and an opaque mask, applies per-component morphological closing to fill micro-fractures without merging adjacent grains, then places exactly one seed per grain. Feed markers into the Watershed node.

nodes.label: Grain Population Stats
nodes.description: Computes population-level grain statistics from a watershed label map: count, area distribution, circularity, aspect ratio, grain/opaque surface fractions, and a grain-size histogram image.

nodes.label: Float Image
nodes.description: Loads float32/uint16 scientific images (TIFF, NDVI, HDR, etc.) and normalizes to 8-bit for processing. Supports min-max stretch, percentile clipping, and fixed range.

nodes.label: GeoTIFF Reader
nodes.description: Read a local GeoTIFF file. Supports multispectral imagery (Sentinel-2, Landsat, etc.)

nodes.label: Earth Engine
nodes.description: Download satellite imagery from Google Earth Engine. Sentinel-2, Landsat-8, MODIS. Automatic local cache.

nodes.label: Webcam
nodes.description: Captures live video feed from your system camera.

nodes.label: Image File
nodes.description: Loads a static image from your local drive.

nodes.label: Movie File
nodes.description: Plays a video file with playback and scrubbing controls.

nodes.label: Solid Color
nodes.description: Generates an image of a custom solid color.

nodes.label: Gaussian Noise
nodes.description: Adds Gaussian noise to simulate film grain or a noisy sensor.

nodes.label: Image Math (Power)
nodes.description: Applies mathematical power operation (gamma) to image pixels.

nodes.label: Bright & Contrast
nodes.description: Adjusts the brightness and contrast of the image.

nodes.label: Salt & Pepper Noise
nodes.description: Adds random white and black pixels (impulse noise).

nodes.label: Channel Split
nodes.description: Splits an image into individual R, G, B (and A) channel grayscale images.

nodes.label: Channel Merge
nodes.description: Merges R, G, B (and optional A) channel images into a single composite image.

nodes.label: MOG2 Subtractor
nodes.description: Separates moving foreground objects from a static background (MOG2).

nodes.label: KNN Subtractor
nodes.description: Separates moving foreground objects using K-Nearest Neighbors approach.

nodes.label: Speckle Noise
nodes.description: Adds multiplicative noise to simulate complex interference.

nodes.label: Image Levels
nodes.description: Adjusts image intensity levels: black point, white point, gamma (midtones), and output range.

nodes.label: Canny Edge
nodes.description: Detects edges using the Canny algorithm.

nodes.label: Gaussian Blur
nodes.description: Applies a Gaussian blur to smooth the image.

nodes.label: Grayscale
nodes.description: Converts the image to grayscale.

nodes.label: Threshold
nodes.description: Separates the image into black and white based on intensity.

nodes.label: Invert Color
nodes.description: Inverts all colors in the image (negative effect).

nodes.label: CLAHE (Contrast)
nodes.description: Adaptively improves local image contrast (CLAHE algorithm).

nodes.label: Bilateral Filter
nodes.description: Smoothes the image while preserving edge sharpness and textures.

nodes.label: BG Removal
nodes.description: Subtracts the static background to isolate only moving objects.

nodes.label: Linear Feature Filter
nodes.description: Filters out non-linear noise and keeps only straight segments at any angle.

nodes.label: Linear Direction Filter
nodes.description: Suppresses or isolates linear elements based on their orientation (angle in degrees).

nodes.label: Directional Morphology
nodes.description: Performs morphological operations (Dilate, Close, etc.) along a specific axis (Horizontal or Vertical).

nodes.label: Shadow removal
nodes.description: Selectively brightens shadows and darkens highlights while preserving midtones, similar to professional photo editors.

nodes.label: Glitch FX
nodes.description: Applies random digital distortions for a 'glitch' effect.

nodes.label: Sobel Edge Detector
nodes.description: Detects horizontal and vertical gradients using the Sobel operator.

nodes.label: Pixelate Filter
nodes.description: Reduces the apparent resolution of the image to create a pixelated effect.

nodes.label: Blob Filter
nodes.description: Removes blobs outside an area range from a binary mask using connected components. Eliminates isolated noise pixels while preserving large regions.

nodes.label: Invert Mask
nodes.description: Inverts a binary mask (black becomes white and vice versa).

nodes.label: Fill Holes
nodes.description: Fills holes (black areas) inside white objects in a binary mask.

nodes.label: Coord To Mask
nodes.description: Creates a circular dot in a binary mask at a specific coordinate.

nodes.label: Mask Blend
nodes.description: Combines two images using a binary mask as a transparency layer.

nodes.label: Color Mask
nodes.description: Creates a mask by isolating a range of colors.

nodes.label: Morphology
nodes.description: Dilation or erosion operations to clean up masks.

nodes.label: Mask Operations
nodes.description: Perform bitwise operations between two masks.

nodes.label: Image to Mask
nodes.description: Converts any image to a binary mask using its brightness.

nodes.label: Points to Mask
nodes.description: Convert a list of points into a binary mask. Each point is drawn as a filled circle.

nodes.label: Region Sealer
nodes.description: Bridges gaps in boundary masks and fills closed regions to create solid blobs.

nodes.label: Mask to Image
nodes.description: Converts a binary mask (1 channel) to a standard image (3 channels).

nodes.label: Float Threshold
nodes.description: Thresholds a raw float32 array (e.g. NDVI, elevation) directly without 8-bit quantization loss. Connect the 'raw' output of Float Image. Water: -0.5→0.0, Vegetation: 0.2→1.0.

nodes.label: Advanced Blend
nodes.description: Blends two images using advanced layer blend modes (Product, Overlay, etc.).

nodes.label: Simple Image Blend
nodes.description: Linearly blends two images based on a simple opacity factor.

nodes.label: Crop
nodes.description: Crops a rectangular region from the image. Define the region interactively using the built-in editor.

nodes.label: Auto Cropper
nodes.description: Crops a specific rectangular area from the image (cropping).

nodes.label: Approx. Polygon
nodes.description: Simplifies a contour into a polygon with fewer vertices.

nodes.label: Fit Shape
nodes.description: Calculates the bounding box or minimum area rectangle for a contour.

nodes.label: Warp Affine
nodes.description: Applies a 2x3 affine transformation matrix to the image.

nodes.label: Rotate (No Crop)
nodes.description: Rotates the image while expanding the canvas to keep all pixels visible.

nodes.label: Offset Shift
nodes.description: Shifts the image horizontally or vertically with wrapping.

nodes.label: Perspective Warp
nodes.description: Straightens a distorted area into a flat rectangle using 4 reference points.

nodes.label: Manual 4 Points
nodes.description: Allows manual definition of 4 reference points on the image for calculations.

nodes.label: Mask Polygon
nodes.description: Interactive polygonal mask — draws a region of interest, optionally restricted by an input mask.

nodes.label: Rotate Image
nodes.description: Applies a custom rotation and scaling to the video stream.

nodes.label: Flip
nodes.description: Inverts the image horizontally or vertically.

nodes.label: Resize
nodes.description: Changes the image dimensions.

nodes.label: Pose Tracker
nodes.description: Analyzes and tracks human body posture (33 keypoints) via MediaPipe.

nodes.label: Eye Crop
nodes.description: Crops and optionally aligns left and right eye regions from MediaPipe Face Tracker landmarks. Reusable for any eye-based classifier.

nodes.label: Track Visualizer
nodes.description: Rendu visuel des tracks SORT/DeepSORT : boîtes colorées par ID, labels et trails de trajectoire.

nodes.label: YOLO Detector
nodes.description: High-performance object detection (80 classes) using the YOLOv11 model.

nodes.label: EVM Color
nodes.description: Eulerian Video Magnification — color amplification (Wu et al. 2012). Amplifies subtle Cr/Cb variations (pulse, perfusion) via Gaussian pyramid + IIR bandpass. Optional mask input: restricts both analysis and amplification to masked pixels (skin ROI). Default params target resting pulse (50–60 BPM). Outputs: amplified video + scientific signal (mean bandpass Cr ×1000, oscillates at pulse rate).

nodes.label: Track Polygon
nodes.description: Calculates the area of a zone defined by multiple tracked landmarks.

nodes.label: DeepSORT Tracker
nodes.description: Suivi multi-objets avec DeepSORT : Kalman Filter + embeddings CNN pour une ré-identification robuste et moins de changements d'ID.

nodes.label: Optical Flow
nodes.description: Analyzes movement between frames using Farneback algorithm.

nodes.label: Universal Monitor
nodes.description: Universal measurement tool for flow, area, brightness, and counting objects.

nodes.label: Face Tracker
nodes.description: Detects and tracks faces and facial landmarks (MediaPipe).

nodes.label: Hand Tracker
nodes.description: Detects and tracks hands and joints (MediaPipe).

nodes.label: Gaze Estimator
nodes.description: ETH-XGaze gaze estimation (pitch/yaw). Loads gaze_estimator.pth.tar. Requires torch + torchvision.

nodes.label: Track Line
nodes.description: Calculates the distance in pixels between two tracked landmarks.

nodes.label: Marker Analysis
nodes.description: Extracts data (ID, coordinates, area) from a label map (markers) and overlays IDs.

nodes.label: Track Point
nodes.description: Extracts the precise coordinates of a specific tracked landmark (e.g., joints).

nodes.label: Landmark Selector
nodes.description: Selects specific points from a landmark list (e.g., torso from pose).

nodes.label: SORT Tracker
nodes.description: Suivi multi-objets en temps réel avec SORT (Kalman Filter + Hungarian). Connecter la sortie 'objects_list' d'un détecteur YOLO ou MediaPipe.

nodes.label: Marker Filter (Area)
nodes.description: Filters markers/labels based on their pixel area. Removes objects that are too small or too large.

nodes.label: Object Detector
nodes.description: Detects common objects (80 categories) using the fast MediaPipe model.

nodes.label: Head Pose
nodes.description: Estimates 3D head orientation (yaw, pitch, roll) via solvePnP on facial landmarks. Connect Face Tracker output.

nodes.label: Statistics
nodes.description: Calculates key statistical metrics (mean, median, standard deviation) from a list.

nodes.label: Heatmap
nodes.description: Generates a cumulative heatmap based on provided detection points.

nodes.label: Color Space Convert
nodes.description: Convert RGB image to HSV or CIE Lab color space for advanced analysis and processing.

nodes.label: EVM Motion
nodes.description: Eulerian Video Magnification — motion amplification (Wu et al. 2012). Amplifies subtle spatial motions via Laplacian pyramid + IIR bandpass per level. Optional mask input: restricts both analysis and amplification to masked pixels. lambda_c attenuates fine spatial scales (paper: 16px for micromotion). attenuation clamps filtered signal before alpha multiply (guards against transients). motion_mag output = mean absolute motion amplitude per frame.

nodes.label: ORB Detector
nodes.description: Detects keypoints and computes ORB descriptors (fast and efficient).

nodes.label: SIFT Detector
nodes.description: Detects high-quality scale-invariant keypoints (SIFT algorithm).

nodes.label: FAST Corners
nodes.description: Rapid corner detection optimized for real-time performance.

nodes.label: Harris Corners
nodes.description: Detects corner points using the Harris mathematical operator.

nodes.label: Feature Matcher
nodes.description: Matches features between two sets of descriptors using BF or FLANN and draws matching lines.

nodes.label: Find Contours
nodes.description: Detects and extracts isolated shapes from a binary image (mask).

nodes.label: Contour Properties
nodes.description: Calculates geometric metrics (area, center, perimeter) of an isolated shape.

nodes.label: Hough Circles
nodes.description: Identifies perfect circular shapes using mathematical circle transforms.

nodes.label: Filter Contours
nodes.description: Filters a contour list by elongation (long/short axis ratio) and/or area. Use min_elongation > 1 to keep only elongated shapes like rivers.

nodes.label: Fill Contours
nodes.description: Fills all contours from a list into a binary mask (union). Connect contours_list from Find Contours.

nodes.label: Hough Lines
nodes.description: Detects straight line segments in the image (walls, joints, etc.).

nodes.label: Threshold (Advanced)
nodes.description: Advanced thresholding including Otsu's method and relative percentage thresholds.

nodes.label: Morphology (Advanced)
nodes.description: Advanced morphological operations like Opening, Closing, and Gradient.

nodes.label: Distance Transform
nodes.description: Calculates the distance from each pixel to the nearest zero pixel (mask border).

nodes.label: Markers (Connected)
nodes.description: Labels connected regions in a binary image. Each region gets a unique ID (Markers).

nodes.label: Watershed
nodes.description: Separates overlapping objects using marker-controlled watershed algorithm.

nodes.label: Marker Filter
nodes.description: Filters markers (label map) by area, removing regions outside the min/max range.

nodes.label: Matrix Distribution
nodes.description: Histogram and distribution analysis of float matrix data.

nodes.label: Frame Accumulator
nodes.description: Accumulate frames over time: mean (noise reduction), std (motion map), temporal diff, running max/min.

nodes.label: Apply Colormap
nodes.description: Applies a scientific colormap (Heatmap, Jet, Magma) to a grayscale image.

nodes.label: Cluster Heatmap
nodes.description: False-color each labeled region by a feature value (area, circularity, intensity…). Requires a label map and the regions list from Region Props. Includes a colorbar legend with min/max values.

nodes.label: Inverse FFT
nodes.description: Reconstructs an image from spectral data. Perfect reconstruction from Complex Data or Magnitude Raw + Phase. Magnitude image input is approximate (visualization data).

params.label: Inverse Log
params.description: Undo log(x+1) on magnitude image input. Not needed for magnitude_raw.

nodes.label: Unit Calibration
nodes.description: Converts pixel measurements (length or area) into real-world units based on a calibration factor.

nodes.label: Image Normalizer
nodes.description: Normalize image or data array. Min-Max, Z-Score, or percentile stretch. Essential preprocessing for scientific imaging.

nodes.label: Line Profile
nodes.description: Extract intensity profile along a line segment. Fundamental in microscopy, spectroscopy, and materials analysis.

nodes.label: Plotter Pro
nodes.description: Advanced multi-series plotter with smooth curves, filtering, thresholding, normalization, and peak detection.

nodes.label: Flow Viz
nodes.description: Colorized visualization of optical flow data.

nodes.label: Inspector
nodes.description: Debug tool to see the raw values of any data stream.

nodes.label: Histogram Analysis
nodes.description: Statistical distribution of pixel intensities. Performs radiometric analysis of input data across spectral channels for scientific validation.

nodes.label: Spectral Gain
nodes.description: 3-band frequency equalizer on raw spectral magnitude. Boost or cut low/mid/high spatial frequencies. Connect FFT.magnitude_raw → SpectralGain → IFFT.magnitude_raw.

nodes.label: Connected Components
nodes.description: Label and count connected regions (particles, cells, blobs). Measures area and centroid of each object.

nodes.label: Colormap / LUT
nodes.description: Apply scientific colormap (LUT) to grayscale image. Converts intensity to false color for visualization.

nodes.label: ROI Statistics
nodes.description: Measure pixel statistics (mean, std, min, max) inside a rectangular region of interest.

nodes.label: Region Props
nodes.description: Extract shape and intensity features from a labeled region map (from Connected Components). Outputs a list of dicts: area, perimeter, circularity, aspect_ratio, solidity, eccentricity, equivalent_diameter, orientation, centroid_x/y, bbox. Connects image input for mean/max/std intensity per region.

nodes.label: Plotter
nodes.description: Multi-series real-time graph. Connect any scalar/list inputs dynamically. Resizable.

nodes.label: Phase Space
nodes.description: 2D phase-space (Lissajous / attractor) plot for any pair of scalar signals. Fading colored trail.

nodes.label: IMU Phase Dashboard
nodes.description: 6-channel phase-space dashboard for IMU (2×3 grid): Accel XY/XZ/YZ + Gyro XY/XZ/YZ. For M5StickC Plus2.

nodes.label: Focus Metric
nodes.description: Measure image sharpness / focus quality. Higher score = sharper. Use for autofocus, Z-stack selection, QC.

nodes.label: Seeds from Boundaries
nodes.description: Generates seed markers for Watershed from a boundary/corner mask. Finds the centers of the 'empty' regions.

nodes.label: FFT Analysis
nodes.description: Advanced 2D FFT Analysis with full color support. Treats BGR channels independently to preserve spectral information. Outputs magnitude, phase, and filtered reconstruction.

params.label: Scientific Range
params.description: Keeps relative intensities instead of normalizing 0-255

nodes.label: Scale Bar
nodes.description: Overlay calibrated scale bar on image. Set Pixels/Unit to match your Unit Calibration node.

nodes.label: Draw Point
nodes.description: Defines a graphical point to overlay on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Line
nodes.description: Defines a line between two coordinates for graphical overlay.

nodes.label: Draw Contours
nodes.description: Draws a list of contours onto an image or a new black background.

nodes.label: Draw Rect
nodes.description: Defines a rectangle to be displayed over the video stream.

nodes.label: Visual Overlay
nodes.description: Overlays graphics (rects, circles, paths) onto an image. Connect any graphics-output node.

nodes.label: Draw Text
nodes.description: Draws text on an image or creates a graphic element. Connect text to the 'text' input and optionally an 'image'.

nodes.label: Group Dicts
nodes.description: Groups multiple dictionaries (e.g. data outputs) into a single list of dictionaries.

nodes.label: Label Filter
nodes.description: Filters a list of detections to keep only specific labels (e.g., 'person').

nodes.label: Coord Splitter
nodes.description: Extracts the first two numeric values from a dictionary (e.g., x, y).

nodes.label: Coord Center
nodes.description: Calculates the center point of a coordinate dictionary (bounding box).

nodes.label: Region Selector
nodes.description: Filters and sorts a list of detection regions. Outputs the selected item and its canonical 4 corner pts (TL→TR→BR→BL) ready for perspective warp.

nodes.label: Compose
nodes.description: Combines two images: side-by-side, split view, blend, difference, or checkerboard.

nodes.label: Dict Get
nodes.description: Extracts 1 to 3 values from a dictionary by key name. val_1/2/3 outputs accept any downstream type; scalar_1 coerces val_1 to float.

nodes.label: On Each
nodes.description: Applies a graphic template to every item in a coordinates list.

nodes.label: List Selector
nodes.description: Extracts a specific item from a list by its index.

nodes.label: Coord Splitter
nodes.description: Splits an {x, y} coordinate dictionary into two separate values.

nodes.label: Coord Combine
nodes.description: Combines two separate values into a single {x, y} coordinate dictionary.

nodes.label: Math Op
nodes.description: Performs simple mathematical operations (+, -, *, /) on two numerical values.

nodes.label: Vec → Screen
nodes.description: Maps yaw/pitch to normalized screen coordinates [0..1]. Connect image for tan()-based projection and visual calibration feedback.

nodes.label: Collect
nodes.description: Accumule des valeurs dans une liste quand la condition est vraie. Exporte en CSV à la demande.

nodes.label: Data Compare
nodes.description: Compares two numerical values using a selected operator (>, <, ==, etc.) and returns true or false.

nodes.label: Presence Check
nodes.description: Checks if a list is not empty or if a value is non-NULL. Useful for triggering events.

nodes.label: Switch
nodes.description: Toggles between two input streams based on a control signal (true/false).

nodes.label: Logic Gate
nodes.description: Performs basic logical operations (AND, OR, XOR, NOT) on two signals.

params.label: Python Script
params.default:
# Logic here
# Inputs: a, b, c, d
# State persistant entre frames: state['my_var']
# Outputs: out_main, out_scalar, out_list, out_dict, out_any

out_main = a if isinstance(a, np.ndarray) else None
out_scalar = 0.0
out_list = []
out_dict = {}
out_any = None

nodes.label: Mask Point Query
nodes.description: Checks if a point (x, y) falls within a mask. Returns True if the mask value at that point is non-zero.

nodes.label: Display Output
nodes.description: Final visualization node. Renders the image stream to the UI.

nodes.label: CSV Export
nodes.description: Exports data to CSV. Dynamic inputs — connect any value to add a column. Use Recording for live streams or Snapshot for single-frame capture.

nodes.label: Snapshot
nodes.description: Captures the current frame and saves it as a new image node in the workspace.

nodes.label: Export Particles
nodes.description: Exports each detected particle as an individual PNG image with a transparent background.

nodes.label: Movie Export
nodes.description: Records frames to MP4. Stream mode captures from pipeline; Webcam mode records directly from camera and creates a Movie node on stop.

nodes.label: Group
nodes.description: Encapsulates a subgraph. Double-click to enter/edit.

nodes.label: Group IN
nodes.description: Relay: group input ports into the subgraph.

nodes.label: Group OUT
nodes.description: Relay: inner subgraph outputs to group output ports.

nodes.label: Note
nodes.description: Adds a textual annotation or comment to the workspace.

nodes.label: Frame
nodes.description: Groups multiple nodes visually inside a frame.

nodes.label: Reroute
nodes.description: Helper to organize connection lines and fan out signals.

nodes.label: Audio File
nodes.description: Loads an audio file and plays it via system audio (sounddevice).

nodes.label: Audio to Spectro
nodes.description: Converts an audio window into a log-mel spectrogram image (dB scale).

nodes.label: Waveform View
nodes.description: Renders the audio waveform as an image.

nodes.label: Freq Filter
nodes.description: Low-pass / High-pass / Band-pass / Band-stop Butterworth IIR filter.

nodes.label: Pitch Shift
nodes.description: Shifts pitch by N semitones without changing duration. Processed once per change.

nodes.label: Time Stretch
nodes.description: Stretches or compresses audio duration without affecting pitch. Processed once per change.

nodes.label: Audio Info
nodes.description: Computes RMS energy, peak amplitude, and zero-crossing rate.

nodes.label: Spectro to Audio
nodes.description: Reconstructs audio from a spectrogram image via Griffin-Lim (trigger to run).

nodes.label: Speaker Out
nodes.description: Receives processed audio and streams it to the browser via Web Audio API.

nodes.label: Audio Export
nodes.description: Saves audio data to a .wav file on disk.

nodes.label: Serial Port
nodes.description: Reads serial data from Arduino, ESP32, or any UART device. Non-blocking background thread. Parses CSV, JSON, or raw strings.

nodes.label: Moving Average
nodes.description: Sliding-window mean. Reduces noise but introduces latency (window/2 frames).

nodes.label: Exp. Smoothing (EMA)
nodes.description: Exponential moving average. alpha=1 = no smoothing, alpha→0 = heavy smoothing.

nodes.label: Kalman Filter
nodes.description: 1D Kalman filter. Q = process noise (dynamics), R = measurement noise.

nodes.label: Median Filter
nodes.description: Sliding-window median. Excellent spike/outlier rejection.

nodes.label: Savitzky-Golay
nodes.description: Polynomial least-squares smoothing. Preserves peak shapes. window must be > polyorder.

nodes.label: Low-pass Filter
nodes.description: 1st-order IIR low-pass. cutoff in mHz, fps in Hz. Attenuates frequencies above cutoff.

nodes.label: Holt-Winters
nodes.description: Double exponential smoothing. Tracks level AND trend. alpha=smoothing, beta=trend.

nodes.label: Gaussian Smooth
nodes.description: Convolves signal buffer with a Gaussian kernel. sigma controls spread.

nodes.label: LOESS / LOWESS
nodes.description: Local regression smoother. span = fraction of points used for each estimate.

nodes.label: Particle Filter
nodes.description: Sequential Monte Carlo estimator. particles = N hypotheses about the true state.

nodes.label: Clock
nodes.description: Pure time source. No inputs needed — forces 30 fps engine ticking. Use as modulation source or pipeline driver.

nodes.label: Signal Generator
nodes.description: Generates synthetic waveforms and noise. Useful for testing signal pipelines without physical sensors.

nodes.label: OCR (EasyOCR)
nodes.description: End-to-end text detection + recognition with EasyOCR. Handles rotated, curved and multi-language text in one pass.

nodes.label: Text Detector (EAST)
nodes.description: Locates text regions in images using the EAST Deep Learning model. Supports rotated text.

nodes.label: OCR (Tesseract)
nodes.description: Extracts text from an image region using Tesseract OCR. Deskews rotated crops automatically.

nodes.label: Root Calibrate
nodes.description: Sets the calibration factor (µm/pixel or px/mm) for root anatomy measurements.

nodes.label: Isolate Section
nodes.description: Isolates the root cross-section from the background and calculates RXSA.

nodes.label: Segment Stele
nodes.description: Segments the stele using radial spatial weighting and local density analysis. Calculates TSA and SCWA.

nodes.label: Cortex Analysis
nodes.description: Calculates cortical areas: TCA, CCWA, XSCWA.

nodes.label: Exclude Lateral
nodes.description: Excludes lateral roots using a polygon mask. Calculates LA. Must run before stele segmentation.

nodes.label: Aerenchyma Detect
nodes.description: Detects aerenchyma lacunae (paper: major_axis > median + N×SD, excludes inner/outer 20% cortex). Computes AA, CCA, %CCA.

nodes.label: Cortical Cells
nodes.description: Counts cortical cells across 3 radial bands (inner/mid/outer). Computes #CC, #CF, CSic/mc/oc.

nodes.label: Xylem Detect
nodes.description: Detects metaxylem vessels using the Max Jump area algorithm (paper §Part V).

nodes.label: Protoxylem Detect
nodes.description: Detects protoxylem vessels (smaller than metaxylem) from remaining stele objects. Run after Xylem Detect.

nodes.label: Endo/Exodermis
nodes.description: Segments endodermis (inner cortex layer) and exodermis (outer cortex layer). Run after Cortex Analysis.

nodes.label: Anatomy Overlay
nodes.description: Generates a colorized overlay of all anatomy layers.

nodes.label: Anatomy Report
nodes.description: Aggregates all anatomical variables. Output: flat dict of plain Python floats, ordered per RootScan Table 1.

nodes.label: Quality Score
nodes.description: Manual quality scoring interface for the analysis.
